characters.name: Abby
characters.description: AbbyGeneral InformationNameAbbyGenderFemaleOccupationCaltech grad student or facultyActorDanica McKellarProductionEpisodeThe Psychic VortexSeasonsS1S2S3S4S5S6S7S8S9S101112 Abbyis aCaltechscience or humanities graduate student/employee, whoRajesh KoothrappaliandSheldonmet when they went to the University Mixer. She is good friends withMartha, and becomes Raj's date for a night. Abby and Martha. AsLeonardandHowardare both off on a double date withPennyandBernadette,Rajesh Koothrappalifeels lonely, and suggests toSheldonthat they go out and have some fun. After much persuasion and actually giving away hisGreen Lanternlantern, Sheldon agrees to go with Raj. At the University Mixer, they meet Abby andMartha, where Martha instantly became interested in Sheldon's limited editionGreen Lanternlantern and power ring. All four of them head back toSheldon's apartment, where they are seen playing Rock Band. Raj yet again is interested in going out with Abby, but she will only agree to hang out with him if Martha can come along. Raj bribes Sheldon with hisIncredible Hulkhands signed by legendary comic book writerStan Lee. As Sheldon and Martha engage in conversation, Abby and Raj make out with each other. Sheldon says that its late and time to go to bed to which happily Martha agrees with. To Martha's surprise Sheldon says good night and leaves her. Later Martha knocks on Sheldon's door and says that "they're getting busy in the living room". She asks if she can hang out in Sheldon's bedroom hoping for coitus with Sheldon. Sheldon accepts, and immediately leaves saying "I'll go sleep in Leonard's room" leaving a very surprised Martha. She hasn't been seen or mentioned again since this incident. ("The Psychic Vortex")

characters.name: Albino Bob
characters.description: Albino BobGeneral InformationNameAlbino BobGenderMaleProductionFirst episodeThe Wheaton Recurrence(mentioned) Albino Bobis a friend ofStuart BloominCBSsitcomThe Big Bang Theory. He is mentioned by Stuart in "The Wheaton Recurrence", and is a member ofthe comic book storebowlingteam. As Bob cannot come to bowling night, he is replaced byWil Wheaton.

characters.name: Alex Jensen
characters.description: Alex JensenGeneral InformationNameAlex JensenBornUnknownGenderFemaleNicknamesEgg Salad Sandwich, Tondelaya Della Ventimiglia (by Sheldon)NationalityAmericanOriginDes Moines, IowaOccupationResearch AssistantActorMargo HarshmanRelationshipsRelationshipsLeonard Hofstadter(crush)FamilyDr. Jensen(father)ProductionFirst episodeThe Higgs Boson ObservationLast episodeThe Tangible Affection ProofNumber of episodes4SeasonsS1S2S3S4S5S6S7S8S9S101112Alex Jensenis aCaltechPhysics doctoral student andSheldon Cooper's assistant. Alex is often required by Sheldon to perform menial tasks, as opposed to assisting with his research. She often uses a very wide-eyed expressisons when having to deal withthe gang's unconventional behavior. She displays a strong attraction for the initially obliviousLeonard, much to the chagrin ofPennyand with interference from Sheldon. A native of Des Moines, Iowa, she graduatedsumma cum laudewith aconcentration in theoretical physics from Stanford University. Inspired by her father, a SETIastronomer, her dissertation concerns looking for Trojan asteroids at Earth's L5 Lagrange point. She gave up an opportunity at Fermilab to come work forSheldon. She is introduced in "The Higgs Boson Observation" (S06E03) when Sheldon hires her. Alex happens to be quite skilled with flattery, shown when she uses it to persuade Sheldon to hire her, even though immediately beforehand he insists that flattery does not work on him. When Leonard andRajesh Koothrappalistop in to visit Sheldon, they meet Alex, whomRajesh Koothrappaliimmediately falls for. Later, Alex meetsPenny, whom she mistakes for Leonard's assistant. Penny becomes jealous immediately after Alex says how talented he is and she is sure a lot of people want to work with him. Penny says that a lot of people can't and takes Leonard off to the bedroom.

Penny becomes jealous immediately after Alex says how talented he is and she is sure a lot of people want to work with him. Penny says that a lot of people can't and takes Leonard off to the bedroom.

characters.name: ALF
characters.description: ALFGeneral InformationNameALFGenderMaleNicknamesALF, Alf (by Missy)ActorPaul FuscoProductionFirst episode"A Race of Superhumans and a Letter to Alf"Number of episodes1 (YS)SeasonsYoung Sheldon:S1S2 ALFwas an alien puppet who enjoyed eating cats. He once had his own TV show.  He appears inA Race of Superhumans and a Letter to Alfsitting at his desk and readingMissy Cooper's fan letter. He gets hungry and calls to his assistantBarb, but she has apparently abandoned him. The voice of ALF is performed byPaul Fusco, who also performed as ALF during its original TV run.

The voice of ALF is performed byPaul Fusco, who also performed as ALF during its original TV run.

characters.name: Alice
characters.description: AliceGeneral InformationNameAliceGenderFemaleOccupationComic book artistActorCourtney FordRelationshipsRelationshipsLeonard Hofstadter(date/kiss)ProductionFirst episodeThe Good Guy FluctuationSeasonsS1S2S3S4S5S6S7S8S9101112 Aliceis a womanLeonardmet at theComic Book Storein the "The Good Guy Fluctuation". She's also aComic Booksenthusiast, who also draws her own comic books, and takes a liking to Leonard. Whilethe gangsearches for newComic Books,Stuartsignals to them that a "hot girl" entered the store, making them wonder as to why she would come in. Stuart tries to talk to her, but can't manage it. Alice continues to look at comics and then talks toLeonard, as he had a rare comic book she was interested in. First she asks if she could pretend to flirt with him while she tries to take the comic. Leonard quips that then she would be using her superpowers for evil. Alice replies that she is forbidden by herKryptonianfather from doing so. Then she introduces herself. She also tells him he's cute and writes her phone number on his hand, asking Leonard to call her so they could trade for the comic book, and walks off to look at other merchandise. Stuart andHowardare stumped as to how Leonard managed to pick her up. Leonard gets his picture put on the "wall of heroes" for this feat. Whilethe gangsearches for newComic Books,Stuartsignals to them that a "hot girl" entered the store, making them wonder as to why she would come in. Stuart tries to talk to her, but can't manage it. Alice continues to look at comics and then talks toLeonard, as he had a rare comic book she was interested in. First she asks if she could pretend to flirt with him while she tries to take the comic. Leonard quips that then she would be using her superpowers for evil. Alice replies that she is forbidden by herKryptonianfather from doing so. Then she introduces herself. She also tells him he's cute and writes her phone number on his hand, asking Leonard to call her so they could trade for the comic book, and walks off to look at other merchandise. Stuart andHowardare stumped as to how Leonard managed to pick her up. Leonard gets his picture put on the "wall of heroes" for this feat. AtSheldonand Leonard'sapartment, Alice shows Leonard her own comic book she drew that is based on her life, and kisses him after he says he's impressed. Her comic book includes a drawing of her having sex with a guy in half of a Chewbacca costume. He immediately agrees to trade comic books with her (or even trade his car in a fit of passion). Leonard later goes to her apartment on a date, but he then feels guilty and proceeds to tell her the truth - that he already has agirlfriendthough she is off inIndia. Alice says that she doesn't believe this revelation and that he is just another jackass. Leonard asks if they can just be friends. He says that his superpower is being a good guy. She proceeds to kick him out. As Leonard walks down the hall he calls himself an idiot.

characters.name: Alicia
characters.description: AliciaGeneral InformationNameAliciaGenderFemaleOccupationActressActorValerie AzlynnProductionEpisodeThe Dead Hooker JuxtapositionSeasonsS1S2S3S4S5S6S7S8S9S10S11S12 AliciaisLeonard,Penny, andSheldon's former neighbor in theapartment above them. She appears inSeason 2Episode 19 "The Dead Hooker Juxtaposition". Alicia first encountersLeonardandSheldonwhen they meet inthe lobby. Sheldon's random, odd questions, annoy her at first, but she answers everything to his approval, and he accepts her presence. Leonard,Howard, andRajesh Koothrappaliimmediately fawn over her and do her multiple favors, and she flirts with all of them except Sheldon.Pennybecomes annoyed that Alicia is blatantly using them and jealous that Leonard is doing favors for Alicia while things he promised Penny long ago remain undone. Like Penny, Alicia is an aspiring actress, although more successful, and has managed to get small television and commercial roles.

characters.name: Althea Davis
characters.description: Althea DavisGeneral InformationNameAlthea DavisBorn1954 (age 70)GenderFemaleOccupationNurseActorVernee WatsonProductionFirst episode"Unaired Pilot""Pilot"SeasonsS1S2S3S4S5S6S7S8S9S10S11S12 Althea Davisis a registered nurse who managed the reception desk at the High-IQ sperm bank in the "Pilot" (and theUnaired Pilot), and also worked at the emergency room and on the patients' floor at the hospital. Althea also appeared in the delivery room whenBernadettewas birthingHalley. She is played byVernee Watson. She deals with situations in a sarcastic and cynical, but serious manner. Her name is not in the credits (other than on her name tag), but she is credited as "Althea".

characters.description: Amy's GrandmotherGeneral InformationNameAmy's grandmotherBornUnknownGenderFemaleOccupationUnknownRelationshipsRelationshipsMrs. Fowler(daughter or daughter-in-law)FamilyMr. Fowler(son or son-in-law)Amy Farrah Fowler(granddaughter)ProductionFirst episodeThe Emotion Detection Automation(mentioned)SeasonsS1S2S3S4S5S6S7S8S9S10S11S12 This unnamedold ladyis the deceased grandmother ofAmy. She has been shown and mentioned a few times. She was either the mother ofMr. FowlerorMrs. Fowler. She is shown on a picture in "The Emotion Detection Automation".

characters.name: Amy's Uncle
characters.description: Amy's UncleGeneral InformationNameAmy's uncleGenderMaleNationalityAmericanRelationshipsRelationshipsUnknownFamilyMr. Fowler(brother or brother-in-law)Mrs. Fowler(sister or sister-in-law)Amy Farrah Fowler(niece)Sheldon Cooper(Nephew-In-Law)ProductionFirst episodeThe Cooper/Kripke Inversion(mentioned)SeasonsS1S2S3S4S5S6S7S8S9S10S11S12 Thismanis the uncle ofAmy Farrah Fowler. She mentions that one of her nicotine addicted monkeys took up smoking a smoking pipe and the monkey reminded her of her uncle, in the episode "The Cooper/Kripke Inversion". She cannot kill him and dissect his brain due to the similarity.

characters.name: Amy's Unnamed Male Cousin
characters.description: Amy's Unnamed Male CousinGeneral InformationNameAmy's Unnamed Male CousinGenderMaleNationalityAmericanOccupationUnknownRelationshipsFamilyLarry Fowler(uncle)Mrs. Fowler(aunt)Amy Farrah Fowler(cousin)Sheldon Cooper(cousin-in-law)ProductionFirst episodeThe Pulled Groin Extrapolation(mentioned)SeasonsS1S2S3S4S5S6S7S8S9S10S11S12 Thismaleis a cousin ofAmy Farrah Fowler. He had been paid to take Amy to her high school prom, but used the money to buy drugs instead as told by Amy in "The Pulled Groin Extrapolation". Later, Amy discloses in "The Prom Equivalency" that she was assigned to the prom clean up crew and did have one dance with her mop while the DJ was finishing up. Her song was "The Lady in Red". Finally, Sheldon does take her to the prom that Amy and Bernadette arranged onThe Roofoftheir apartment buildingto make up for what her cousin did.

characters.name: Amy's Unnamed Male Cousin
characters.description: Amy's Unnamed Male CousinGeneral InformationNameAmy's Unnamed Male CousinGenderMaleNationalityAmericanOccupationUnknownRelationshipsFamilyLarry Fowler(uncle)Mrs. Fowler(aunt)Amy Farrah Fowler(cousin)Sheldon Cooper(cousin-in-law)ProductionFirst episodeThe Pulled Groin Extrapolation(mentioned)SeasonsS1S2S3S4S5S6S7S8S9S10S11S12 Thismaleis a cousin ofAmy Farrah Fowler. He had been paid to take Amy to her high school prom, but used the money to buy drugs instead as told by Amy in "The Pulled Groin Extrapolation". Later, Amy discloses in "The Prom Equivalency" that she was assigned to the prom clean up crew and did have one dance with her mop while the DJ was finishing up. Her song was "The Lady in Red". Finally, Sheldon does take her to the prom that Amy and Bernadette arranged onThe Roofoftheir apartment buildingto make up for what her cousin did.

characters.name: Angela Page
characters.description: Angela PageGeneral InformationNameAngela PageOccupationFBI Special AgentActorEliza DushkuRelationshipsRelationshipsUnnamed husbandProductionFirst episodeThe Apology InsufficiencyLast episodeThe Apology InsufficiencyFBI Special Agent Angela Pageis the F.B.I. agent who does a background check onHowardfor his security clearance to be on the Defense Department Laser Equipped Surveillance Satellite team. She is married to a 6-foot 2 inches (188 cm) Navy Seal. She seems rather tolerant to the antics of the boys, especiallySheldon. Raj doesn't want to get deported. The Agent Angela Page In "The Apology Insufficiency", she did a background check onHowardfor his security clearance. On her interview withRajesh Koothrappali, he keeps talking about how he is in United States legally because he was paranoid of getting deported back to India. Then,Leonardhit on her, but soon discovered that she was already married. In the end, it wasSheldonwho drove the final wedge when he accidentally mentioned Howard crashing theMars roverwhile trying to impress a girl; (Stephanie Barnett). After Howard failed to get his clearance which Sheldon did feel guilty about, he did let Howard sit inhis spotfor under two minutes, but failed in his attempts to retract his statement. The actress played the role straight against all the craziness of the gang.

characters.name: Anu
characters.description: AnuGeneral InformationNameAnuBorn1983-1984 (age 39-40)GenderFemaleReligionPossibly HinduNationalityIndianOriginIndiaOccupationHotel ConciergeActorRati GuptaRelationshipsRelationshipsRajesh Koothrappali(ex-fiancé/ex-boyfriend)Unnamed ex-boyfriendFamilyUnnamed parentsProductionFirst episodeThe Procreation CalculationLast episodeThe Maternal ConclusionNumber of episodes9SeasonsS1S2S3S4S5S6S7S8S9S10S11S12 Anuis the woman thatV.M. Koothrappaliset up in an arranged marriage with his sonRajesh Koothrappali. Her first appearance was in the third episode ofSeason 12, "The Procreation Calculation". Raj and Anu meet and both seem happy with the arranged marriage until Raj feels that there won't be enough romance in their relationship. Anu is not happy with Raj leaving, gets down on one knee and proposes to Raj. He accepts as the restaurant breaks into applauds.

characters.name: Aunt Barbara
characters.description: Aunt BarbaraGeneral InformationGenderFemaleProductionFirst episodeThe Adhesive Duck Deficiency(mentioned) Barbara Wolowitzis the aunt ofHoward Wolowitzand may be the sister of eitherSam WolowitzorDebbie Wolowitz, though probably hers since she is divorced. At her house, Howard lost his virginity to his second cousinJeaniein a Toyota Corolla after his UncleMurray Wolowitz's funeral. She has become an aunt-in-law toBernadette Rostenkowski-Wolowitzsince her marriage to her nephew Howard. She is the great-aunt ofHoward and Bernadette's daughter,Halley Wolowitzand sonNeil Michael Wolowitz. Aunt Barbara's nephew.

characters.name: Aunt Marion
characters.description: Aunt Marion is the aunt ofSheldon, and thesisterof eitherGeorge Cooper Sr.orMary Cooper. She is mentioned in "The Vartabedian Conundrum" when Sheldon says that he received astethoscopeandsphygmomanometerfrom her so he could have a trade to fall back on if he failed attheoretical physics.

characters.name: Barbara Chen
characters.description: Barbara ChenGeneral InformationNameBarbara ChenGenderFemaleNationalityAsian-AmericanOccupationZangen Employee (Retrovirus Department)RelationshipsFamilyUnnamed childProductionEpisodeThe Military MiniaturizationSeasonsS1S2S3S4S5S6S7S8S9S10S11S12 Barbara Chenis a minor character in The Big Bang Theory. She is a Zangen employee who Bernadette assumed was the one who told everyone about her pregnancy, possibly thinking it was revenge for Bernadette telling everybody about Barbara's own pregnancy. She also has a hearing aid.

characters.name: Barbara Chen

characters.name: Barry Kripke
characters.description: Barry KripkeAdultYoung AdultGeneral InformationNameBarry KripkeBornPossibly May 12GenderMaleNicknamesBawwy (by Siri and Sheldon)NationalityAmericanOccupationPhysicistActorJohn Ross BowieRelationshipsRelationshipsAmy Farrah Fowler(former crush)Beverly Hofstadter(romantic interest)ProductionFirst episode"The Killer Robot Instability"Last episodeThe Change ConstantNumber of episodes25SeasonsS1S2S3S4S5S6S7S8S9S10S11S12 Beverly Hofstadter(romantic interest) "I am a stwing pwagmatist. I say I'm gonna pwove something that cannot be pwoved, I appwy for gwant money, and then I spend it on wiquor and bwoads."―Barry Kripke,The Relationship Diremption "We’re all pathetic and cweepy and can’t get girls, that’s why we fight wobots."―Barry Kripke,The Killer Robot Instability Despite being a stereotypical geek, Barry apparently tries to be fairly sporty, as shown in "The Friendship Algorithm". In that episode, it was implied that he enjoys polo,water polo, and rock-climbing. "The Rothman Disintegration" reveals that Kripke and Sheldon are "equally bad" at sports. Unlike his colleague, Kripke is fully aware of his limitations and shortcomings, even admitting that he is "creepy, pathetic and can't get girls". He has been known to make inappropriate comments to women, photograph his own genitials and upload the shots to the Internet ("The Beta Test Initiation"), and enjoys hanging out at a strip club near his apartment, which has a free buffet ("The Rothman Disintegration"). He also seems to enjoy strippers, and has no shame about openly discussing his sex life. Kripke is often suggested to be coasting in his job—in one instance he even goes as far to say that "[he] says [he]'ll prove something that can't be proved [string theory], then use the money for 'wiquow and bwoads' "liquor and broads". On the other hand, in "The Cooper/Kripke Inversion", Sheldon admits Kripke's grant proposal for a fusion reactor forCaltechis "leaps and bounds" ahead of his [Sheldon's] own. This suggests that, despite Leonard not believing Kripke to be smarter than Sheldon, he is apparently able to work at Sheldon's level. This may be the reason for Kripke's success in retaining his job despite his apparent predilection for coasting, lack of interest in the advancement of science and multiple counts of career-destroying behavior.

characters.description: Barry SwansonGeneral InformationNameBarry SwansonBorn1944 (age 80-81)GenderMaleNationalityAmericanOccupationDentistActorJosh CookeRelationshipsFamilyLinda Swanson(ex-wife)Erica Swanson(older daughter)Paige Swanson(younger daughter)ProductionFirst episode"A Rival Prodigy and Sir Isaac Neutron"Last episode"Carbon Dating and a Stuffed Raccoon"SeasonsThe Big Bang Theory:S1S2S3S4S5S6S7S8S9S10S11S12Young Sheldon:S1S2S3S4S5S6 Erica Swanson(older daughter)Paige Swanson(younger daughter) Barry Swansonis the father ofPaige SwansonandErica Swansonand ex-husband ofLinda Swanson.
